knowledge_atoms.text: Do you like the music, children?
Good job! I like the trees. The colours are very pretty!
Hello, Miss White. Look at my picture.
I like snow, too. Which season do you like best, Wu Binbin?
I like spring because there are beautiful flowers everywhere.
I like spring best. There are beautiful flowers everywhere.
I like spring best. There are beautiful flowers everywhere. I often go on a picnic with my family.
I like summer best because of Children's Day.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 我最喜欢夏天，因为有儿童节。

knowledge_atoms.text: I like summer, but I can't swim.
Learn the consonant blend 'br' as in 'brown'.
Learn the consonant blend 'gr' as in 'green'.
Learn the sound of 'r' in words like 'library' and 'umbrella'.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 学习字母'r'在'library'和'umbrella'等词中的发音。

knowledge_atoms.text: Look at my picture, Miss White. I like summer best because of Children's Day.
Look at the green trees and pink flowers.
Summer. I can go swimming every day!
Survey classmates about their favourite season.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 调查同学们最喜欢的季节。

knowledge_atoms.text: The Four Seasons. Today we'll draw the seasons. Which season do you like best, Mike?
The weather is hot, hot, hot!
Understand that seasons are opposite in the Northern and Southern Hemispheres.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 理解南北半球的季节是相反的。

knowledge_atoms.text: What do you often do in summer?
What do you usually do on Christmas Day?
What is the weather like today? Listen and write.
What lovely colours! The leaves fall and fall and fall. I love fall!
Which season do you like best?
Which season do you like best? Why? Complete the sentence.
Winter. I can sleep all day. How about you?
Winter. I often play in the snow.
Wow! I want to paint a picture, too!
Yes. I like autumn best. The weather is good and the colours are beautiful! Which season do you like best, Miss White?
Yes. It's very beautiful. What is it?
Zhang Peng and John are looking at some pictures. Which is Zhang Peng's picture? Listen and tick.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: My favourite season. 单元首页图。在美术课上，约翰和艾米讨论他们最喜欢的季节以及原因。同时，小动物兹普和祖姆也在讨论它们各自喜欢的季节，引出本单元关于季节和喜好的主题。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word season?
Can you say: Which season do you like best?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: My favourite season. 在教室里，奥利弗向怀特老师展示了一张关于儿童节的画，并解释说他最喜欢夏天是因为儿童节。老师接着询问他在夏天经常做的活动。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word summer?
Can you say: I like summer best because of Children's Day.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Favourite Seasons. 在美术课上，琼斯老师播放了《四季》这首曲子，并引导学生们讨论自己最喜欢的季节，然后准备画出季节的图画。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word beautiful?
Can you say: Which season do you like best?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: The Four Seasons. 老师在课堂上展示了四季的图片，并向学生提问他们最喜欢的季节，以此引出四个季节的单词。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word spring?
Can you say: Which season do you like best?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Phonics: br / gr / r. 根据单词中的发音，将词库中的单词分类填写到'br'和'gr'两个组别中。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word green?
Can you say: Read and group.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Favourite Seasons. 艾米向怀特老师展示她画的秋天图画，并与老师讨论了各自最喜欢的季节以及原因。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word pretty?
Can you say: Which season do you like best?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Seasonal Activities. 通过图片展示了四种典型的季节性活动，并配有问答对话，练习讨论喜欢的季节及相关活动。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word go on a picnic?
Can you say: Which season do you like best?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Describing seasons. 机器人罗宾通过四张邮票般的图片，分别描述了春夏秋冬四个季节的特点以及它喜欢（或不喜欢）的原因。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word spring?
Can you say: Look at the green trees and pink flowers.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Unit 2 Check & Wrap-up. 听一段男孩和女孩的对话，并根据内容填写对话中缺失的部分。
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen and write.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Story time. 一个连环画故事。来自澳大利亚的考拉来过圣诞节。兹普和祖姆对考拉在圣诞节去海滩游泳感到惊讶，考拉解释说在南半球的澳大利亚，圣诞节是在夏天。最后，它们一起在雪地里堆雪人，体验了一个“白色圣诞节”。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word Merry Christmas?
Can you say: Understand that seasons are opposite in the Northern and Southern Hemispheres.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 单元首页图。在美术课上，约翰和艾米讨论他们最喜欢的季节以及原因。同时，小动物兹普和祖姆也在讨论它们各自喜欢的季节，引出本单元关于季节和喜好的主题。 Key patterns: Which season do you like best?; Why?
core_patterns: Which season do you like best?
Why?
Because the colours are pretty!
Winter. I can sleep all day. How about you?
Autumn.
I like spring best. There are beautiful flowers everywhere.
allowed_answer_scope: I like spring best. There are beautiful flowers everywhere.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word season?
Can you say: Which season do you like best?
return_anchors: Which season do you like best?
Why?
Because the colours are pretty!

core_patterns: I like summer best because of Children's Day.

Look at my picture, Miss White. I like summer best because of Children's Day.

return_anchors: I like summer best because of Children's Day.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 听录音，根据对话内容判断今天的天气，并从词汇瓶中选择正确的描述填空。 Key patterns: What is the weather like today? Listen and write.

return_anchors: What is the weather like today? Listen and write.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Use the page dialogue pattern in short guided practice.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一个调查活动。学生需要询问同伴最喜欢的季节，并在表格中做标记。小动物们提供了一个问答示例。 Key patterns: Survey classmates about their favourite season.; Which season do you like best?

Which season do you like best?
Winter.

return_anchors: Survey classmates about their favourite season.

Winter.

teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 老师在课堂上展示了四季的图片，并向学生提问他们最喜欢的季节，以此引出四个季节的单词。 Key patterns: Which season do you like best?; Summer. I can go swimming every day!

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice match activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 阅读四句描述不同季节特点的句子，并将它们与对应的季节图片进行匹配。 Key patterns: Read and match
core_patterns: Read and match
allowed_answer_scope: Picture of a spring scene with flowers and butterflies.
Picture of a summer pond with bright sunlight.
Picture of a farmer harvesting in a golden field.
Picture of a winter scene with a snowman and snow-covered house.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Read and match
return_anchors: Read and match

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Read and understand the key information in the passage.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一个连环画故事。来自澳大利亚的考拉来过圣诞节。兹普和祖姆对考拉在圣诞节去海滩游泳感到惊讶，考拉解释说在南半球的澳大利亚，圣诞节是在夏天。最后，它们一起在雪地里堆雪人，体验了一个“白色圣诞节”。 Key patterns: Understand that seasons are opposite in the Northern and Southern Hemispheres.; What do you usually do on Christmas Day?
core_patterns: Understand that seasons are opposite in the Northern and Southern Hemispheres.
What do you usually do on Christmas Day?
Which season do you like best?
Welcome!
Thank you. Merry Christmas!
Merry Christmas!
allowed_answer_scope: I usually go to the beach and swim in the sea!

entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word Merry Christmas?
